tools.name: ecwid_get_store_profile
tools.description: Get the store's profile — general info (store id, name, currency), company details, and settings. Ecwid REST: GET /profile.

tools.name: ecwid_search_products
tools.description: Search / list the store's products with optional filters (keyword, SKU, category, stock, price range) and sorting. Returns a paged collection ({total, count, offset, limit, items}). Ecwid REST: GET /products.

tools.name: ecwid_get_product
tools.description: Get a single product by its id, including price, stock, options, images, and category assignments. Ecwid REST: GET /products/{productId}.

tools.name: ecwid_search_orders
tools.description: Search / list the store's orders with optional filters (keyword, customer email/id, payment & fulfillment status, coupon, created-date range). Returns a paged collection. Ecwid REST: GET /orders.

tools.name: ecwid_get_order
tools.description: Get a single order by its order number, including line items, totals, customer, and payment/fulfillment status. Ecwid REST: GET /orders/{orderNumber}.

tools.name: ecwid_search_customers
tools.description: Search / list the store's customers with optional filters (keyword, email, name, customer group). Returns a paged collection. Ecwid REST: GET /customers.

tools.name: ecwid_get_customer
tools.description: Get a single customer by id, including contact details, addresses, and customer group. Ecwid REST: GET /customers/{customerId}.

tools.name: ecwid_list_categories
tools.description: List the store's product categories, optionally scoped to a parent category and including hidden ones. Returns a paged collection. Ecwid REST: GET /categories.

tools.name: ecwid_get_category
tools.description: Get a single category by id, including its name, parent, product ids, and images. Ecwid REST: GET /categories/{categoryId}.

tools.name: ecwid_list_discount_coupons
tools.description: List the store's discount coupons with optional filters (coupon code, discount type, availability). Returns a paged collection. Ecwid REST: GET /discount_coupons.

tools.name: ecwid_adjust_product_inventory
tools.description: ADJUSTS a product's in-stock quantity by a delta — this MODIFIES live store data. Positive increases stock, negative decreases it. Ecwid REST: PUT /products/{productId}/inventory with JSON body {quantityDelta}. Returns {updateCount, warning?}.

tools.name: ecwid_update_order
tools.description: UPDATES an order — its payment status, fulfillment status, and/or tracking number. This MODIFIES live store data and may trigger customer notifications. Ecwid REST: PUT /orders/{orderNumber}. Provide only the fields you want to change. Returns {updateCount}.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: ecwid_search_orders, ecwid_search_customers · Private data: ecwid_get_customer · Public sink: ecwid_search_orders, ecwid_search_customers.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: ecwid_search_orders, ecwid_search_customers · Private data: ecwid_get_customer · Public sink: ecwid_search_orders, ecwid_search_customers

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
